title: OMS Predicate v1.0
description: JSON Schema for the OMS predicate body within an in-toto Statement v1. This schema defines only the model-signing-specific predicate; the enclosing in-toto Statement and Sigstore Bundle are governed by their respective specifications.

resources.description: File manifest. Each entry describes one file in the signing scope, per in-toto Resource Descriptor (https://github.com/in-toto/attestation/blob/main/spec/v1/resource_descriptor.md).

resource_descriptor.description: A single file entry in the model manifest.

name.description: Relative path from the model root, using '/' as separator.

digest.description: Hex-encoded hash of the file contents.

serialization.description: Canonicalization metadata recording how files were enumerated and hashed.

hash_type.description: Hash algorithm used for all resource digests. See algorithm-registry.md.

allow_symlinks.description: Whether symbolic links were followed during file enumeration.

ignore_paths.description: Paths excluded from the signing scope.
